step_rationale: AMI biomarker candidate; rewires macrophage lipid metabolism driving foam-cell formation and plaque inflammation.
mechanism: ACSL1 overexpression in macrophages drives lipid uptake and esterification, promoting foam-cell formation and plaque destabilization.

references.title: Chronic kidney disease induces distinct alterations of macrophage lipid metabolism in a mouse model of atherosclerosis.
Early diagnostic biomarkers for acute myocardial infarction unveiled by metabolomics, Mendelian randomization, and machine learning.
